title: Complete execution plan phase 5 (allocator + GC hooks + interop builtins)
body:
## What was done

Closed **execution plan Phase 5**: runtime allocator integration, GC scaffolding wired to gc-arena, interop builtins, and diagnostic improvements around runtime failures.

## Why it mattered

Phase 5 is the milestone where Pecan’s JIT path became **demo-complete** for allocator/GC—not production-complete, but enough to validate lowering → runtime → collection hooks.

## Outcome

Execution/GC deliverable `v00-execution-jit-gc` reached its closed date alongside concurrency research notes.

source.subject: Mark Phase 5 complete with runtime allocator, GC scaffolding, interop builtins, and diagnostic improvements
